overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player driving a futuristic vehicle through a concrete tunnel and emerging into a rainy tropical urban environment. The player follows a red sedan through winding palm-tree-lined streets with rocky hillsides and dense vegetation while rain streaks across the windshield.

events.description: approaching tunnel exit, daylight becomes visible at the tunnel end

agents.ego_description: driving through the underground tunnel following a red sedan ahead

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving ahead in the same lane maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: smooth gray concrete tunnel wall with horizontal construction seams
smooth gray concrete tunnel wall with horizontal construction seams
linear fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a narrow concrete tunnel with artificial overhead lighting. The camera moves forward steadily behind a red sedan, with smooth gray walls passing on both sides. The tunnel exit becomes visible ahead as a bright point of daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy palm tree lined urban boulevard

events.description: exits the tunnel into open air with heavy rain and tropical palm trees visible
transition from sheltered tunnel to rain-exposed outdoor environment

agents.ego_description: driving on rain-slicked roads following the red sedan through light traffic

notable_agents.action: red sedan continuing ahead on the wet road with brake lights occasionally visible

entered.detail: tall tropical palm trees lining the left side of the roadway
tall tropical palm trees lining the right side of the roadway
modern street lamp posts along the left sidewalk
metal guard rail running along the right edge of the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from the tunnel into a heavy downpour, transitioning from artificial to natural diffused lighting. Palm trees line both sides of the wet multi-lane road, and modern street lamps pass by on the left. The red sedan continues ahead as rain streaks across the windshield.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding coastal highway with rocky hillside

events.description: navigating a right curve in the road alongside a rocky cliff face
taking a left curve through dense palm tree coverage

agents.ego_description: following the red sedan through winding curves with rocky terrain visible on the right side

notable_agents.action: red sedan navigating the winding curves ahead with varying speed

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face with patches of vegetation on the right side
thick tropical foliage and bushes growing on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The road winds through a tropical landscape with a rocky hillside rising on the right and dense palm trees on both sides. The vehicle follows the red sedan through alternating right and left curves, with guard rails passing close by on the right. The heavy rain continues to reduce visibility slightly.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection approach with dense tropical vegetation

events.description: approaching a road intersection with traffic signage visible on the left
slight right turn as the road widens near the intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing to follow the red sedan as the road widens approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: red sedan maintaining speed while approaching the intersection ahead

entered.detail: traffic signage indicating road directions mounted on the left side
yellow road markings and lane dividers indicating intersection approach

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches an intersection on a wider section of road, with traffic signage visible ahead on the left. The rocky hillside gives way to more urban structures in the distance, while palm trees continue to line both sides of the rain-soaked street. The red sedan maintains its lead as the road curves slightly to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sterile confines of a concrete tunnel into a rain-soaked tropical urban landscape. It begins moving steadily behind a red sedan through a narrow tunnel with artificial overhead lighting, heading toward a bright point of daylight at the exit. As the vehicle emerges, the lighting shifts to a natural diffused glow and the environment opens into a heavy downpour with palm trees and modern street lamps lining the wet road. The scene then winds through a tropical corridor where the road curves between dense vegetation and a rising rocky hillside, with rain streaking across the windshield. Finally, the terrain transitions from the hillside toward distant urban structures as the vehicle approaches a wider intersection with traffic signage, following the red sedan through a slight right curve.
